creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
All versions are security releases and contain important security fixes - read the corresponding security advisories here:

https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-core-sa-2023-005
https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-core-sa-2023-006
https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-core-sa-2023-007

For details about the releases, please see:

https://typo3.org/article/typo3-1248-and-11533-security-releases-published
